channel.title: OfficeAndWin — Microsoft Software Keys
channel.description: Genuine Microsoft software licenses — Windows, Office, Server. Instant digital delivery. Microsoft Partner. 21k+ reviews.

item.g:title: Microsoft Exchange Server 2016 Enterprise Product Key Instant Delivery
item.g:description: Genuine Microsoft Exchange Server 2016 Enterprise Product Key Instant Delivery digital product key — instant delivery via email. No physical item shipped. One-time purchase, genuine Microsoft license. Microsoft Partner listed. 21,000+ verified reviews. 4.71★.
